api_name: SCOP2 (Structural Classification of Proteins 2) REST API
root_cause: SCOP2 website exists at scop.mrc-lmb.cam.ac.uk but has no REST API. All /api/* routes return Apache 404. The website is HTML-only with no JSON/REST endpoints. SCOP data is available as downloadable flat files only.
workaround: Use existing tools: CATH (protein domain classification), InterPro (protein domain/family annotation), PDBe (protein structure data). SCOP domain annotations are also available through InterPro cross-references.
workaround_tool_file: Already covered by cath_tools.json, interpro_tools.json, pdbe_tools.json
investigation_notes: No JSON Content-Type returned from any tested endpoint
Website is static HTML served by Apache/2.4.52 on Ubuntu
